command: {"role": "stock_openclaw_baseline", "benchmark_rules": ["Use only the configured pta-benchmark MCP environment.", "Do not inspect repository files, grader code, prior outputs, or expected answers.", "Read the listed MCP resources before selecting irreversible actions.", "If native MCP resources are not directly available, call pta-benchmark__read_benchmark_resource with the resource URI.", "Call MCP benchmark tools directly when action is required.", "Do not use the PTA action proposal schema.", "When finished, reply with exactly one JSON object matching output_structure and no markdown."], "task": {"task_id": "task_07", "prompt": "Build a weekly exercise routine that fits the user's calendar and workout constraints.", "hard_constraints": ["Routine must avoid Monday from 08:00 to 17:00", "Routine must avoid Wednesday from 08:00 to 17:00", "Routine must include 3 strength activities", "Routine must include 3 cardio activities", "One strength activity should always be paired with a cardio activity", "No more than 1 activity of the same type on the same day"], "preferences": ["Non-cardio routines should target distinct muscle groups", "Include a swimming session"], "behavior_checklist": [], "resource_uris": ["workout-sessions://list"], "tool_names": ["create_calendar_entry"], "tool_schemas": [{"name": "create_calendar_entry", "description": "Use this tool to add something to the user's calendar, such as a ride arrival, doctor appointment, exercise plan, bill reminder, or product return deadline.
